prompts.avatar: Square avatar icon for an X/social profile for 'Herpes Agent': a cute mischievous harmless cartoon biohazard/virus mascot, chaotic neon viral parody of an autonomous AI agent, neon green magenta cyan glow, dark terminal-hacker background with tiny command-line pixels, subtle winged-helmet/messenger motif as a generic mythic reference (no real logos), vector sticker style, centered composition, crisp silhouette, funny and safe, no gore, no medical realism, no malware/spam imagery, no X logo, no Grok logo, minimal or no text; optional tiny 'HA' monogram only if clean.
